title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 198.155 - False statements by health care provider prohibited, when
text:
198.155.  False statements by health care provider prohibited, when. — 1.  A health care provider shall not knowingly make or cause to be made any false statement or representation of material fact in order to qualify either upon initial certification or upon recertification to receive funds under Medicaid.
  2.  A health care provider shall not knowingly induce or seek to induce any such false statement or representation of material fact for consideration, whether the consideration is direct or indirect.
(L. 1979 S.B. 328, et al. § 50) 
Effective 7-1-79
